working_on: Session B of three-session OSS+BYOK refactor: downstream doc rewrites per ADR 0065 (business.md / infrastructure.md / ROADMAP.md / MISSION.md) + ADR 0014 editorial extension absorbing the pedagogical-degradation principle + pick up S-0128 leftover cleanup (ENGINE_LOG invented section + STATE.md side-discoveries → Issue links #91 + #92).
outcome_summary: Session B of three-session OSS+BYOK refactor delivered per the approved plan. Five files rewritten / extended against ADR 0065's eight-commitment contract: business.md (Personal Project Disposition → eight commitments; Pricing and Distribution table; Operating Cost Model → Infrastructure Operating Cost; Annual Operating Subsidy Budget section retired; Cost Amplification with Session Length reframed user-side); infrastructure.md (Deployment Target rewritten Apple-only + client-direct; new BYOK key handling subsection naming Keychain storage and the load-bearing architectural clarification that graph build and graph analysis remain back-end maintainer work, not user-device work — user conversations surface signals like bug reports, the maintainer adjudicates); ROADMAP.md (Phase 8 + Phase 9 success criteria rewritten — cost-cap-mechanism criterion removed; BYOK onboarding flow + force-crash test + milestone-bound repo-migration trigger as Phase-9-entry gate added; Phase 9 pedagogical-degradation discipline per ADR 0014 replaces prior cost-cap-against-production criterion; static-polish foreclosure extends to bind against user-funnel-mechanic; Phase 1.5 historical narration of ADR 0035's original commitments annotated with inline supersession marker); MISSION.md (Disposition + commitment 2 rewrites); ADR 0014 Consequences extended absorbing the retired ADR 0029 pedagogical-degradation principle (optional editorial pass folded in per the approved plan). S-0128 leftover cleanup picked up first: ENGINE_LOG invented `### Known unfixed` subsection removed (Keep-a-Changelog discipline); STATE.md side-discoveries prose replaced with Issue-link references to #91 + #92. ENGINE_LOG `[Unreleased]` extended with S-0129 Changed entries. STATE.md Last build session + Next session work item rows replaced (next: S-0130 LICENSE / PII / OSS hygiene / public-flip). 7 commits (eager-claim + cleanup + 5 substantive rewrites + closeout). Soft-warns persistent only — issue_collision 28, missing_rigor_score 360, orphan_leaf 1; no new categories. issue_collision count rose from 21 (S-0128) to 28 because Issues #91 + #92 now exist and surface as collision candidates. User pushback mid-session corrected one infrastructure.md framing error (client did not become responsible for graph analysis under BYOK — graph build remains back-end work; user device emits per-user mastery-state events the back-end consumes structurally, the same shape ADR 0026 transcript-non-persistence already implied).
